action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh. CIFAR-100-LT task with imbalance ratio 100. Need to build classifier maximizing balanced accuracy. Analysis: Use a strong pretrained backbone (ConvNeXt-Tiny or ViT-CLIP), fine-tune on CIFAR-100-LT with class-balanced loss. Decision: Start with quick pipeline using ResNet50 or ConvNeXt-Tiny pretrained, with weighted CE loss and basic augmentation. First iteration: get baseline working with few epochs, submit eval to measure time.
